calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2008 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-11-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Minor's Compromise hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Karen Farnsworth, CSR #5162.
Robert A. Dalby, Esq. appeared with petitioner Tuere K. Thomas, who was present as Guardian ad litem with Lauryn Thomas, a minor Claimant, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $5,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $1,108.26.
Medical Expenses $863.00.
Costs - $629.07.
A net balance of $2,399.67 to be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America located at 5000 Third Street, San Francisco, CA 94124. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Minor'S Compromise
Off Calendar Mar-11-2008 Granted Per Written Order
